01 — About

About me.

I am a Computer Engineering student at Usha Mittal Institute of Technology, S.N.D.T. Women's University, Mumbai, with a strong interest in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Game Development. I enjoy combining these fields to build innovative and impactful projects while continuously expanding my technical expertise.

As an aspiring indie game developer, I design and develop 2D games using Unity and C#, focusing on gameplay mechanics, enemy AI, and creating engaging player experiences. I enjoy tackling complex development challenges and turning ideas into polished, interactive games.

Alongside game development, I actively explore AI technologies and modern development tools to enhance my workflow, automate repetitive tasks, and build smarter, more efficient applications. I am passionate about continuously learning, experimenting with emerging technologies, and applying them to create meaningful software solutions.

Vision / AI Python, OpenCV, MediaPipe 0.94
Game Dev Unity, C# 0.91
Visual Design Brand systems, motion 0.89
Based in Mumbai, India —
